ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nuco uses the camera only to scan a contact's code.
ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nuco uses the microphone only during calls. Audio is end to end encrypted.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nuco accesses photos only to send an image you pick. Metadata is removed on your device before sending.

Localizable.strings.\"Unlock Nuco to connect the call\": Unlock Nuco to connect the call
